sections_cited: Section 73 of the Sindh Cooperative Societies Act
Section 117 of the Sindh Cooperative Societies Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 547 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on CMA No.257/2024 (I Rule 10) 2. For hearing of CMA No.5710/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 13.02.2024 M/s Mehfooz Ahmed Awan, Farhan Ali Shaikh and Ateeq-ur- Rehman Shaikh, Advocates for petitioners. M/s Qurban Ali Malano and Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocates for respondents No.6 & 7. Mr. Abdul Baqi Jan Kakar, Advocate for intervenor. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Shahid Hussain Odho, Government Cooperative Inspector, Cooperative Societies, Sukkur Division..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Mr. Abdul Baqi Jan Kakar has filed power on behalf of petitioner No.1, which is taken on record. We have heard the parties to some extent and have come to know that a Special Court for deciding disputes of Cooperative Societies in pursuance of Section 73 of the Sindh Cooperative Societies Act, 2020, has been established and functioning. The Honourable Chief Justice of this Court has been pleased to designate learned 2nd Senior Civil Judge/Assistant Sessions Judge, Sukkur to act as a Special Court for Cooperative Societies of Sukkur Division. Section 117 of the Sindh Cooperative Societies Act, 2020 provides that on establishment of Special Courts under sub- section, the cases falling within the purview of this Act pending in any Court shall be transferred to the Special Court for trial. We, therefore, in the light of above provisions, with consent, transmit this petition to the Special Court for Cooperative Societies, Sukkur Division, and direct the said Court to decide the case strictly in terms of sub-section of section 117 of the ibid Act.

Section 117 of the Sindh Cooperative Societies Act, 2020 provides that on establishment of Special Courts under sub- section, the cases falling within the purview of this Act pending in any Court shall be transferred to the Special Court for trial. We, therefore, in the light of above provisions, with consent, transmit this petition to the Special Court for Cooperative Societies, Sukkur Division, and direct the said Court to decide the case strictly in terms of sub-section of section 117 of the ibid Act. The petition in the above terms stands transmitted to the Court of learned 2nd Senior Civil Judge / Assistant Sessions Judge, Sukkur / Special Court for Cooperative Societies, Sukkur Division along with listed applications. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
